caption: A man wearing a dark green t-shirt, a matching green baseball cap, and over-ear headphones is speaking into a professional microphone in a room filled with clothing and memorabilia. The man's t-shirt features the text "YON NEVER DO SHIT" in white lettering. He is positioned in front of a wall decorated with several framed photographs. To his right, a white mannequin wears a white garment, and racks of clothing are visible in the background. Across the frames, the man shifts his expression and posture; he begins by speaking, then turns his head to the right and touches his shoulder, and finally looks toward the right with a smile. Two logos appear at the bottom of the scene: a circular logo on the left and a red text logo on the right that reads "BADDY RELLY".
